MINI MINUTES: RESPONDENT HECTOR GUERRERO'S Motion to Dismiss Appeal of Order Decision or Award of The Labor Commissioner. Appearances: Anne Hipshman, Staff Attorney, State of California, Dept. of Industrial Relations, (415) 703-4863, appearing for Respondent and moving party. There are no other appearances. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Granted. No opposition filed.
